cards.name: Last Shot Counts
cards.effect: Gundam gains a [Strength] Upgrade. Its attacks cost [TL-1] this turn. If it defeats an enemy unit this turn, it gains an additional [Strength] Upgrade.

cards.name: Veteran's Momentum
cards.effect: Your active unit gains +2 [Strength] this turn. Its attacks count 7's and 8's as [Crit] this turn.

cards.name: Earth Federation Shield
cards.effect: [After Attack Roll] An allied unit is delt -2 [Damage].

cards.name: Forward Artillery Position
cards.effect: Guncannon gains an [Energy]. It gains +1 [Strength] this turn for each Garrison you've Rescued.

cards.name: Return Fire
cards.effect: [After Combat Damage] The defending allied unit makes an attack at [TL-1]

cards.name: Shield the Recovery
cards.effect: After an allied unit Rescues a Garrison: It gains a [Shield] Upgrade

cards.name: Entrenched Position
cards.effect: Guntank gains a [Shield] Upgrade. It captures an objective it is on or adjacent to.

cards.name: Built to Last
cards.effect: Your active unit gains 1 hit point for each Upgrade on it. units cannot gain more than their max hit points)

cards.name: Lock Down the Perimeter
cards.effect: Your active unit destroys 1 Upgrade on an enemy unit within [Range 3] and Slows that unit.

cards.name: Crimson Execution
cards.effect: Char's Zaku II makes an additional Dash at [TL 0]. Then, it makes an additional Heat Hawk attack at TL 0].

cards.name: Exploited Chaos
cards.effect: [After Combat Damage] The attacking allied unit gains an [Energy] and a [Strength] Upgrade.

cards.name: Sudden Pressure
cards.effect: Your active unit deals 2 [Damage] to each enemy unit and Garrison within [Range 3].

cards.name: Rescued Extraction
cards.effect: Zaku II, Linebreaker Rescues an allied Garrion within [Range 3] at [TL 0]. Then it gains an [Energy]

cards.name: Breaking the Line
cards.effect: Your active unit destroys 1 Upgrade on an enemy unit within [Range 3] and Fracture that unit.

cards.name: Logistics Relay
cards.effect: After an allied unit Rescues a Garrion: It gains a [Speed] Upgrade.

cards.name: Iron Grip
cards.effect: After an enemy unit ends its movement adjacent to Zaku II, Enforcer: it deals 3 [Damage] to that enemy unit.

cards.name: Drive Them Back
cards.effect: Your active unit Moves 2. Then Push 1 an adjacent enemy unit and deal 1 [Damage] to it.

cards.name: Shattered Formation
cards.effect: [After Combat Damage] if the defending allied unit survives the attack, it deals 2 [Damage] to the attackers.
